content_html:
Wrap-Up

INF10024 Business Digitalisation



Mark Dale and Rohan Bennett
May 2023

What   ar e  t he  obj ect i ves  for   t oday?


1.  Provide a brief rev i ew   of   t he   uni t  including what you (hopefully) achieved and how we did it


2.  Revisit the core concepts, topics, and tools in Business Information Systems


3.  Outlines the next steps for you when it comes to involvement in Business Information
    Systems

What   wer e  t he  l ear ni ng  obj ect i ves?


1.Analyse   and explain how technology supports           the strategic goals and core processes of
  business


2.Use appropriate software tools for the provision of business solutions


3.Discuss the use and impacts of internet, networks, mobile devices, social media, and business
  intelligence tools in business


4.Describe ethical, cultural and security concerns associated with  technology use


5.Independently or collaboratively communicate             professionally

Broadly, where did this unit fit?

Lots to cover (but, also over the next 3 years)!

What   wer e  our   cor e  t hemes?




1. What are the basic features and functions of Information                                           … data, processes, people,
Systems?                                                                                              technology, management

2. How are the basic ingredients of business influenced and                                           … strategy, operations, models,
                                                                                                      competition, competences,
interrupted by information technology?                                                                functions, management


3. Why do we need to manage the relationship between                                                  … data, databases, requirements
business and technology, and what tools and techniques do                                             modelling, system design, SCM, CRM,
we have available?                                                                                    ERP, outsourcing


4. How will emerging technologies continue to impact on                                               … don’t need tech deep dive to
business?                                                                                             ex p lo re st rat eg ic an d  o p erat io n al
                                                                                                      impacts

5. What global change forces will impact on technology                                                … ethics, privacy, cybersecurity
development?

What   wer e  our   cor e  concept s?


Business    :: the trading of goods and services between parties for
the purposes of profit making                                                                         In IBIS we also include
                                                                                                     government, NFPs, and
                                                                                                              NGOs



Information :: what is conveyed by the sequencing of things
                                                                                                     In IBIS this manifests as
                                                                                                        data in databases,
                                                                                                     software, and networks


Systems    :: related entities working together to complete a task
within a bounded        environment                                                                    In IBIS these entities
                                                                                                     include people, process,
                                                                                                      data, technology, and
                                                                                                               rules

Wher e  t o  next ?


For those doing IS or IS majors, you’ll unpack many of the topics were covered in IBIS in full units


For those studying other business courses, you’ll find IS related material keeps popping up in your studies:
all business disciplines now need to deal with the impact of digital transformation


For other those in other fields (e.g., engineering, science, arts), treat IS and IS students as a friend. We’re
here to help you transfer and explain your ideas into a technical reality –                 to an audience that might not be
so technical.

Thanks.





Goodluck!
